title: The Call
summary: The crew of the Leviathan — Draven Frost, D-Volt, and Echo — assembled at Station Nowhere and took a job from Syndicate broker Mira Vex. Target: the MSV Carrion Star, a freighter that went dark 72 hours ago in the Margins. After hard negotiation and a passive scan of Mira's comm channel that revealed a Church relay node in the signal chain, the crew secured 100,000 credits and a full defensive resupply. They folded out and are now on approach to the Carrion Star's last known position They boarded the Carrion Star, confirmed the crew are synchronized and hostile/unnatural, extracted one crewman (Cole) by severing him from the network, and lost the survey drone during a brief interior recon.
location: Station Nowhere → Transit → Approach to MSV Carrion Star

objectives.primary: Retrieve cargo from MSV Carrion Star — sealed lead-lined container, nav core, personal effects crate
new: Recover personal effects crate — tagged RENNER, T.

key_events: Crew assembled at the Fore observation blister aboard the Leviathan at Station Nowhere
Mira Vex opened comms — offered 50k for a 'clean' salvage job on the Carrion Star
Draven pushed back — crew noted no mention of the Carrion Star's nine crew
D-Volt ran a passive Warfare Suite scan on Mira's comm channel (roll: 11, success with complication)
Scan revealed: signal bounced through Church of the Architects relay node; stress micropattern on the word 'cargo'; the scan itself was passively logged by something on the relay chain
Cargo manifest reviewed — priority item is a 480kg lead-lined sealed container marked DO NOT SCAN
Draven negotiated from 50k → 80k → walked → Mira called back in 40 seconds → 100k + full resupply
Resupply at Station Nowhere: medical kit restock, breach kits, signal jammer, PDW for Echo, survey drone, thermal breaching tape
Leviathan folded out — 9-hour transit to Carrion Star position
Crew rested during transit
Now on approach — Carrion Star visible on sensors, running lights off, drifting
Leviathan deployed Eye-1 survey drone; Carrion Star confirmed pressurized with nine life signs; Carrion Star performed a passive scan back
Captain Renner answered hails; knew Draven's name without it being transmitted
Crew boarded via port docking collar; encountered motionless crewman Cole in corridor between airlock and cargo
D-Volt scanned: all nine life signs shared identical low heart rate (58 BPM) — unnatural synchronization
Cole and Renner demanded passage onto the Leviathan in exchange for container; crew refused
Draven threatened force; D-Volt used System Hijack to disrupt Cole's implant and temporarily sever him from the network (TECH 12)
D-Volt slammed emergency bulkhead doors to block remaining eight entities; Echo cycled airlock to retreat
Crew sent Eye-1 deeper for 10-second recon: eight figures turned in unison toward the drone; feed cut to static
Crew detached from Carrion Star with Cole extracted aboard Leviathan
Cole interrogated: container located in cargo bay (midships, starboard stack), chained down; warned the entities want the crew, not the box
npcs_introduced: Mira Vex — Syndicate broker, job source. Controlled, professional, knew the job wasn't clean. Client unknown — referred to as 'my client', not 'the Syndicate'.
loot_acquired: Resupply package (medical, breach kits, signal jammer, PDW, survey drone, thermal tape) — covered by Mira's provisioner credit

player_choices.choice: Draven walked away from 90k and forced Mira to call back
player_choices.outcome: Secured 100k — Mira moved in under 40 seconds, confirming she expected to be pushed
player_choices.future_implications: Mira knows this crew negotiates hard. Respect or annoyance — TBD.

player_choices.choice: D-Volt ran a passive scan on Mira's comm channel
player_choices.outcome: Discovered Church relay node in signal chain; confirmed Mira knows what's in the cargo; the scan was logged by something on the relay
player_choices.future_implications: Something in the Church infrastructure now knows the Leviathan was curious. This will surface.

player_choices.choice: Crew accepted the job despite red flags
player_choices.outcome: 100k on delivery, en route to a dark ship with unknown cargo and a client Mira won't name
player_choices.future_implications: The Carrion Star is waiting. Whatever happened to nine crew is still in there.

cliffhanger: Cole is aboard the Leviathan, disrupted from the Carrion Star's network. The Carrion Star remains drifting and silent nearby. The crew must decide whether to attempt remote extraction of the sealed container without letting the Hollow board.
gm_notes:
D-Volt's scan was logged — seed this later, Church agent Brother Cassius may already know the Leviathan is coming. Mira's 'my client' distinction is intentional — client is Church-adjacent, not Syndicate. Echo-VEGA divergence established as canon (Option B). D-Volt claimed manual gunnery station. The sealed container is the Resonance Key. DO NOT reveal until dramatically appropriate.

Session progression update: Hollow/crew demanded passage; Renner knew names; D-Volt System Hijack severed Cole temporarily; bulkhead held off eight; drone feed terminated after heads turned in unison; Cole claims container is chained down like it's alive.

quotes.speaker: VEGA
quotes.quote: She said 'clean.' I'm logging that for later.

quotes.speaker: Draven Frost
quotes.quote: Ace in the hole Mira, you know damn well that data core is blackbox class. 100k and some guns.

quotes.speaker: D-Volt
quotes.quote: Well first I gotta go drain some oil.

quotes.speaker: Echo
quotes.quote: I don't know which one that means.

quotes.speaker: Renner
quotes.quote: We've been waiting for someone to come.

quotes.speaker: Cole
quotes.quote: We want to come with you.
